AI Voice-to-Invoice

Hindi + English
AI
Say or type:
"Create bill for Rahul, ₹5000, GST 18%"
You can say: customer name, amount, GST, state.
AI is ready.

AI Assistant

Tip: Speech recognition needs HTTPS or localhost in most browsers.

Manage Business

Business profile, tax preferences, and brand assets for invoices.
Business Profile Complete Keep details updated for smoother compliance and invoice delivery.
1
Business Identity Add business name and contact details
2
Tax Readiness Configure GST and compliance fields
3
Branding Upload logo for invoice identity

Approval Sign Add signature for faster approvals
Core Business Info

These details are printed on invoices and shared with clients.

Tax & Compliance

Set tax configuration once. Taxinvoo applies it across invoices and reports.

Logo

Your logo appears on invoice PDFs and customer-facing documents.

Recommended: square PNG
Signature

Use a sign image for trust and faster approval on printed invoices.

Transparent PNG works best
QR Code

Attach UPI or payment QR for quicker collections.

Use clear, high-contrast QR
Terms, signature, and branding assets appear on invoice print/PDF.
Custom Fields

Attach extra metadata (website, MSME, licence number, etc).

Tools
Data Backup & Transfer Select a business, then export only that profile backup.
Selected scope: Active business only.
Business Management Create separate business profiles and keep records isolated.
Danger Zone

Delete business permanently after secure confirmation.

500+ users
FAQ
Can I switch plans later?

Yes. You can upgrade anytime as your billing needs grow.

Is GST billing included in all plans?

Yes. GST-ready billing is available across all plans.

Do you offer onboarding help?

Growth and Pro include guided help, with dedicated support on Pro.

How would you like to get started?
Choose a path. You can return to this anytime from Dashboard.
Complete Setup

Fill business details, GST profile, and payment details first.

Create First Invoice

Jump directly to sales invoice creation and start billing now.

Configure Settings

Upload logo/signature and choose template for branded invoices.

Switch Business
Create Business
Add another business profile. You can edit all details later in Manage Business.

Delete Business

This action permanently removes the selected business profile and related local data.
